mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post ( user_id, book_id, post_title, post_content ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{bookId}, #{postTitle}, #{postContent} )
mapper.select: SELECT post_id, user_id, book_id, post_title, post_content, post_date, post_view_cnt, post_last_modified FROM post ORDER BY post_date DESC
SELECT post_id, user_id, book_id, post_title, post_content, post_date, post_view_cnt, post_last_modified FROM post WHERE post_id = #{postId}
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET post_title = #{postTitle}, post_content = #{postContent}, post_last_modified = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE post_id = #{postId}
mapper.select: SELECT post_id, user_id, book_id, post_title, post_content, post_date, post_view_cnt, post_last_modified FROM post WHERE book_id = #{bookId} ORDER BY post_date DESC
SELECT post_id, user_id, book_id, post_title, post_content, post_date, post_view_cnt, post_last_modified FROM post WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY post_date DESC

SELECT post_id, user_id, book_id, post_title, post_content, post_date, post_view_cnt, post_last_modified FROM post WHERE post_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR post_content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY post_date DESC
